project_info.name: Cruise Terminal 5 — Cruise-Day Program
project_info.owner: Tampa Port Authority d/b/a Port Tampa Bay
project_info.note: Excludes parking garage (~240,000 SF) and exterior/site areas

program_mode_description: Full terminal operations for embarkation and debarkation of up to 3,000 passengers. All passenger processing, baggage, federal inspection, and support systems active.

space_library.logic_rule: Linear progression: arrival → check-in → security → hold → board. No backflow.
space_library.name: Main Entry Lobby / Check-In Hall
space_library.description: Flexible kiosk + agent layout; clear sightlines to security
space_library.adjacency_notes: Direct feed to A.02 Security Screening

space_library.logic_rule: Linear progression: arrival → check-in → security → hold → board. No backflow.
space_library.name: Security Screening (TSA/CBP)
space_library.description: 4–6 lanes; expandable to 8; direct feed from check-in
space_library.adjacency_notes: Between A.01 Check-In and A.03 Post-Security Holding

space_library.logic_rule: Linear progression: arrival → check-in → security → hold → board. No backflow.
space_library.name: Post-Security Holding / Waiting
space_library.description: General + zone seating; distributed F&B; 1,500–1,800 pax peak
space_library.adjacency_notes: Adjacent to A.05 Retail/F&B and A.07 Boarding Bridge

space_library.logic_rule: Linear progression: arrival → check-in → security → hold → board. No backflow.
space_library.name: VIP / Loyalty Lounge
space_library.description: Separate entry; private check-in; concierge
space_library.adjacency_notes: Independent access; near A.07 Boarding Bridge

space_library.logic_rule: Linear progression: arrival → check-in → security → hold → board. No backflow.
space_library.name: Passenger Amenities (Retail/F&B)
space_library.description: Post-security concessions; revenue-generating
space_library.adjacency_notes: Within post-security holding zone

space_library.logic_rule: Linear progression: arrival → check-in → security → hold → board. No backflow.
space_library.name: Family / Accessible Waiting
space_library.description: Stroller staging; ADA seating; near elevators
space_library.adjacency_notes: Adjacent to D.01 Passenger Elevators

space_library.logic_rule: Linear progression: arrival → check-in → security → hold → board. No backflow.
space_library.name: Boarding Bridge Vestibule
space_library.description: Weather-protected; continuous sliding doors
space_library.adjacency_notes: Terminal-to-vessel transition; end of embark sequence

space_library.logic_rule: Compressed high-throughput: ramp → FIS → bags → exit. No mixing with embark flow.
space_library.name: Dedicated Debarkation Ramp
space_library.description: Vessel-to-FIS; physically separated from embark gangway
space_library.adjacency_notes: Direct feed to B.02 FIS

space_library.logic_rule: Compressed high-throughput: ramp → FIS → bags → exit. No mixing with embark flow.
space_library.name: CBP Federal Inspection Service (FIS)
space_library.description: Primary + secondary + APHIS + interview; sealed zone
space_library.adjacency_notes: Between B.01 Ramp and B.03 Baggage Claim

space_library.logic_rule: Compressed high-throughput: ramp → FIS → bags → exit. No mixing with embark flow.
space_library.name: Baggage Claim Hall
space_library.description: Flat-bed devices; oversized area; CBP inspection tables
space_library.adjacency_notes: Fed from C.02 Debark Laydown; exits to B.04

space_library.logic_rule: Compressed high-throughput: ramp → FIS → bags → exit. No mixing with embark flow.
space_library.name: Post-CBP / Meeter-Greeter
space_library.description: Reunification; ground transport info; clear exit wayfinding
space_library.adjacency_notes: Terminal exit to H.01 Curbside and H.04 Plaza

space_library.logic_rule: Parallel system: baggage moves independently of passengers. Never sequential bottleneck.
space_library.name: Luggage Laydown – Embark
space_library.description: Curbside drop → porter sort → conveyor feed to vessel
space_library.adjacency_notes: Adjacent to H.01 Curbside; feeds C.03 BHS

space_library.logic_rule: Parallel system: baggage moves independently of passengers. Never sequential bottleneck.
space_library.name: Luggage Laydown – Debark
space_library.description: Vessel off-load → staging → claim device feed
space_library.adjacency_notes: Feeds B.03 Baggage Claim

space_library.logic_rule: Parallel system: baggage moves independently of passengers. Never sequential bottleneck.
space_library.name: BHS Equipment Room
space_library.description: Conveyors, screening, controls; expandable footprint
space_library.adjacency_notes: Between C.01/C.02 laydown areas

space_library.logic_rule: Parallel system: baggage moves independently of passengers. Never sequential bottleneck.
space_library.name: Cart / Equipment Storage
space_library.description: Porter equipment; cart corrals
space_library.adjacency_notes: Near C.01 Embark Laydown and E.06 Loading Dock

space_library.logic_rule: Redundant capacity at every level change. Code + operational + peak surge.

space_library.description: High-capacity; ADA; grouped at main core
space_library.adjacency_notes: Central core; serves all levels

space_library.logic_rule: Redundant capacity at every level change. Code + operational + peak surge.

program_summary.note: Excludes parking garage (~240,000 SF) and exterior/site areas

plan_archetypes.notes: Bar along berth for passenger flow; hall-and-wing for large multi-berth terminals

space_sequences.name: Passenger Embarkation
space_sequences.description: Linear progression: arrival → check-in → security → hold → board. No backflow. Passengers must not reverse direction or re-enter completed stages.

space_sequences.name: VIP / Loyalty Embarkation
space_sequences.description: VIP branch after security: post-security → VIP lounge → boarding bridge. Rejoins main flow at boarding.

space_sequences.name: Passenger Debarkation
space_sequences.description: Compressed high-throughput: ramp → FIS → baggage claim → meeter-greeter exit. No mixing with embarkation flow.

space_sequences.name: Baggage – Embarkation
space_sequences.description: Parallel system: baggage moves independently of passengers from laydown to vessel via BHS. Never a sequential bottleneck with passenger flow.

space_sequences.name: Baggage – Debarkation
space_sequences.description: Vessel → BHS equipment room → debark laydown → baggage claim hall. Converges with passenger debark at claim hall.

space_sequences.name: Staff / Operations Circulation
space_sequences.description: Back-of-house staff circulation connecting operations, CBP offices, break areas, and loading dock. Must not cross passenger flows.
